description_full:
📍 Remote (Global) | 🕐 Posted 1 day ago - May 16, 2026 | 🧑‍💻 Contract / Full-time / Internship | 🔗 Various Tech Stacks

CloudTrains Global is actively expanding its network of skilled tech professionals for exciting opportunities with startups, SaaS companies, and fast-growing businesses.

🧳 Open Positions:
- Full Stack Developer (React + Node)
- Frontend Developer (React)
- Backend Developer (Node / APIs)
- Java Developer (Spring Boot / Microservices)
- .NET Developer (ASP.NET / .NET Core)
- AI / Automation Developer (LLMs / APIs / Workflows)
- AI Integration Engineer (OpenAI / LangChain / RAG)
- Shopify / Headless Commerce Developer
- Prompt Engineer / AI Integrator
- Computer Vision Engineer
- Cloud & DevOps Expert (AWS / Docker / CI/CD)
- Microservices Architect (Java / .NET / Node)
- API Engineer (GraphQL / Advanced REST)
- Backend Engineer (High-Scale Systems)
- Web Performance Optimization Expert
- Web3 / Blockchain Developer
- UI/UX Designer (Figma / SaaS Focus)
- Data Engineer (ETL / Pipelines / Big Data)

👨💻 Experience Required: 2–5 Years (Hands-on project experience preferred)

🎯 Ideal Candidates: Strong technical execution and ownership, problem-solvers with a growth mindset, professionals passionate about building scalable digital products, and candidates comfortable working in fast-paced startup environments.

📩 To apply: Register here: https://forms.gle/9Ve1k7gKf7UtKWAJ6
